name: manga-ocr-for-chrome
description: Extract japanese text from images on a page

scripts.dist:darwin: if [[ ! -d "./dist" ]]; then mkdir dist; fi; cp -r ./res/* ./dist/ && cp ./popup.html ./dist/popup.html
scripts.dist:linux: if [ ! -d "./dist" ]; then mkdir dist; fi; cp -r ./res/* ./dist/ && cp ./popup.html ./dist/popup.html
scripts.clean:darwin: for file in './out/' './dist/'; do if [[ -e "$file" ]]; then rm -r "$file"; fi; done
scripts.clean:linux: for file in './out/' './dist/'; do if [ -e "$file" ]; then rm -r "$file"; fi; done

author: ryan.darge@gmail.com
